title: A Merchant's War Chest
description: Stake a rising trader who means to stand for office. The Dynatoi reward those who climb — and expect the climb to pay dividends.

title: Pamphlets in the Agora
description: Hire the scribes and the loud-voiced to argue the case for reform in every stoa before the chamber meets. Opinion is a commodity like any other.

title: Buy a Ship-captain a Seat
description: A bold young naukleros with silver but no name — put the price of the Three Hundred in his hand and make him yours.

title: Audit the Waverers
description: Call in the members whose loyalty has cooled and review their accounts with the party. Debt is leverage, and leverage is loyalty.

title: The Harbor Regatta
description: Fund a festival of the sea in the party's name — races, prizes, and a fortune in spilled wine. Massalia's future, the Dynatoi remind her, is on the water.

title: A Lending House
description: Charter a party bank to finance ventures the old families would never touch. Credit is the new aristocracy, and the Dynatoi mean to mint it.
